channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 60/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 19.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Streeting backs new North Sea drilling and says he would increase high-skilled immigration if he becomes PM
item.description: Streeting backs new North Sea drilling and says he would increase high-skilled immigration if he becomes PM

item.title: The Guardian: Wes Streeting plans to increase high-skilled immigration if he becomes PM - The Guardian
item.description: Wes Streeting plans to increase high-skilled immigration if he becomes PM - The Guardian

item.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: So excited* for the 6 month retrospectives around Christmas as they 1) quite reasonably blame the Starmer government for the situation 2) look anywhere but themselves for their own lack of work and thinking
*other, l...
item.description:
So excited* for the 6 month retrospectives around Christmas as they 1) quite reasonably blame the Starmer government for the situation 2) look anywhere but themselves for their own lack of work and thinking
*other, l...

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Molly Russell’s father says rushing through social media ban for under-16s would be ‘deplorable’
item.description: Molly Russell’s father says rushing through social media ban for under-16s would be ‘deplorable’

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Burnham is visibly not across the detail of what the Starmer government has actually done in office which is going to make his first months in office absolutely crackers.
item.description: Burnham is visibly not across the detail of what the Starmer government has actually done in office which is going to make his first months in office absolutely crackers.

item.title: The Telegraph: Streeting: I would use North Sea oil to fund heat pumps - The Telegraph
item.description: Streeting: I would use North Sea oil to fund heat pumps - The Telegraph

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Zelenskyy thanks UK for intercepting Russian shadow fleet oil tanker after armed forces board vessel - as it happened
item.description: Zelenskyy thanks UK for intercepting Russian shadow fleet oil tanker after armed forces board vessel - as it happened

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Ministers to look again at defence investment plan after Healey’s resignation
item.description: Ministers to look again at defence investment plan after Healey’s resignation

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Wes Streeting plans to increase high-skilled immigration if he becomes PM
item.description: Wes Streeting plans to increase high-skilled immigration if he becomes PM

item.title: i Politics: Andy Burnham: I’ll keep the triple lock, and give pensioners a tax cut
item.description: Andy Burnham: I’ll keep the triple lock, and give pensioners a tax cut
